'''âz-n-z-l''' ('''kazanzeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:charcoalise|charcoalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:charcoalise|charcoalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-n-z-l
|-
! Lemma
| kazanzeloko
|}
